basic_details.job_title: ERNET India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline For Assistant, Junior Scientific Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Education and Research Network of India (ERNET India)
basic_details.post_name: Assistant, Junior Scientific Officer and More
basic_details.short_information: Education and Research Network of India (Education and Research Network of India) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website ERNET India . A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the ERNET India Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 09 June 2026- within 30 days from date of publication of this advertisement

age_limit.age_details: Max age 45 years for Senior Manager, 30 years for Jr. Scientific Officer and Technical Assistant, 27 years for Assistant and Personal Assistant.
age_limit.details: Senior Manager: Maximum age 45 years. Junior Scientific Officer: Maximum age 30 years. Technical Assistant: Maximum age 30 years. Assistant: Maximum age 27 years. Personal Assistant: Maximum age 27 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, B.E./B.Tech, M.Sc., Diploma in Engineering, B.Sc.
qualification.details: Senior Manager (Group A): B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent (60%) +12 years exp OR M.E./M.Tech (60%) +10 years OR Ph.D. +8 years in Computer Communication & networking, Data Communication, Internet & Web Technology, VSAT Communication. Junior Scientific Officer (Group A): B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent (60%) or DOEACC B level +5 years exp in Computer Communication & networking, Data Communication, Internet & Web Technology, VSAT Communication. Technical Assistant (Group B): Diploma in Engineering/B.Sc. (60%) or DOEACC A level +5 years exp in Computer Communication & networking, Data Communication, Internet & Web Technology, VSAT Communication. Assistant (Group B): Graduate +3 years experience in relevant field with working knowledge of computers. Desirable: Diploma in Personnel/Finance/Marketing/Purchase Management. Personal Assistant (Group B): Graduate +3 years experience in relevant field + shorthand speed 120/100 wpm in English/Hindi + knowledge of computer operations. Desirable: Experience in S&T organization.

salary_details.details: Senior Manager: (Rs.123100-215900) Junior Scientific Officer: (Rs.56100-177500) Technical Assistant: (Rs.35400-112400) Assistant (Group B) :Rs.35400-112400) Personal Assistant: (Rs 35400-112400)

selection_process: Initial screening based on academic records & experience Test/Interview/Skill test
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for ERNET India Recruitment 2026 is 09 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ERNET India has announced a total of 5 vacancies for various posts in the latest recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for ERNET India Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the posts in ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will range from Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 2,15,900 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant post, candidates must be a Graduate with at least 3 years of experience in a relevant field and possess working knowledge of computers.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) in the official notification for ERNET India Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Senior Manager post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Manager post is 45 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening based on academic records and experience, followed by a test, interview, or skill test.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form for ERNET India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ERNET India. The link will be provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address for sending the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the completed application form is mentioned in the official notification PDF. Candidates are advised to check the notification carefully.
